Description: Event table describing speaker-to-speaker or within-speaker transitions anchored to the offset of an anchor IPU.
RowDefinition: One row represents one transition from an anchor IPU to the next relevant IPU.

onset.Description: Transition anchor time, defined here as the anchor IPU offset relative to run onset.

duration.Description: Transition event duration. This template uses 0.0 because the row is anchored to a boundary event.

next_speaker.Description: Speaker for the next IPU considered part of the transition.

next_ipu_id.Description: Identifier for the next IPU linked to the transition.

anchor_offset.Description: Anchor IPU offset time relative to run onset.

next_onset.Description: Onset of the next IPU relative to run onset.

gap_or_overlap_s.Description: Signed difference between next_onset and anchor_offset. Positive values indicate a gap and negative values indicate overlap.

latency_from_anchor_offset_s.Description: Latency from anchor_offset to next_onset. In this template it is numerically identical to gap_or_overlap_s.

transition_type.Description: Categorical summary of the signed transition timing.

Source.AnnotationSource: Turn-transition events derived from IPU timing

Method.Algorithm: Transition derivation from ordered IPU boundaries
Preprocessing: IPU rows sorted by speaker-specific and global onset.
Postprocessing: Signed transition metrics computed from anchor offset and next onset.

Notes: If the project later distinguishes turn exchanges from within-speaker pauses more strictly, keep the sign convention for gap_or_overlap_s unchanged.
